message:
feat(host): add invoke endpoint, rollout pin/unpin/rollback APIs, and enriched status

Expand the fcp-host HTTP API with invoke forwarding and full rollout
lifecycle management including version pinning and manual rollback.

New endpoints:
- POST /rpc/invoke: forward invoke requests to connectors with preflight
  authorization, connector-not-found and preflight-denied error handling,
  and structured tracing for operation/correlation tracking
- PUT /rpc/rollout/pin/{connector_id}: pin a connector to a specific
  version, preventing rollout from advancing past it
- GET /rpc/rollout/pin/{connector_id}: query current pin state
- DELETE /rpc/rollout/pin/{connector_id}: remove version pin
- POST /rpc/rollout/rollback: manually roll back a connector to a
  specified version with optional reason, returning from/to versions
  and lifecycle state transition

HostLifecycleManager enhancements:
- Add pinned_versions map with pin/unpin/pinned_version accessors
- Add rollout_status() returning enriched RolloutStatusResponse with
  pin state and canary traffic percentage
- SubprocessConnector gains invoke() method for RPC forwarding
- SubprocessRegistry gains invoke() for routing by connector_id

New request/response types:
- PinRequest, PinStateResponse, RollbackRequest, RollbackResponse,
  RolloutStatusResponse (with flatten on LifecycleStatus)

Integration tests:
- Add rollout pin/unpin lifecycle test with state verification
- Add manual rollback test with version tracking assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
